listitem.para: The string representation of an access control security label that is interpreted by the Linux Security Module (e.g. SELinux) for use with Labeled IPsec.
Labeled IPsec support is IKEv2 only.
History: the parameter was originally called policy-label=; it was renamed to sec-label= in &Libreswan; 4.2; &IKEv1; support for Labeled IPsec was removed in &Libreswan; 5.0.
